---
name: Feature
about: Spec out a new feature for implementation
labels: feature
---

## What
One sentence description of the feature.

## Why
Why does this need to exist? What problem does it solve?

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Specific, testable thing that must be true when this is done
- [ ] Another testable criterion
- [ ] Edge case that must be handled

## Dependencies
- Blocked by: #<issue number> (or "none")
- Must merge before: #<issue number> (or "none")

## Out of scope
What this issue explicitly does NOT include. Be specific.

## Technical notes
- Any implementation hints or constraints
- Reference relevant ADRs from `ai/decisions/` if applicable
- Note any files or modules likely to be affected
